title: Principal Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India Capital India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India Capital India:
Maruti Suzuki India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India!
